title: Chromasync Target Spec
description: Defines how semantic tokens are rendered into output files for a specific application. Supports inheritance via 'extends'.

name.description: Target name. Lowercase letters, digits, '-', or '_'.

extends.description: Name of another target to inherit artifacts from. Derived artifacts with the same file_name override base artifacts.

artifacts.description: Output file definitions. Required if 'extends' is not set.

file_name.description: Output file name. No path separators, not '.' or '..'.

template.description:
File content template with placeholders.

Token placeholders:
  {{tokens.<NAME>}}                — hex value (#rrggbb)
  {{tokens.<NAME> | hex_no_hash}}  — without # prefix
  {{tokens.<NAME> | rgba(FF)}}     — RGBA hex with alpha

Context placeholders:
  {{ctx.mode}}           — dark/light
  {{ctx.template_name}}  — template name
  {{ctx.output_dir}}     — output directory
  {{ctx.seed}}           — seed color

Available tokens: bg, bg_secondary, surface, surface_elevated, text, text_muted, border, border_strong, accent, accent_hover, accent_active, accent_fg, selection, link, success, warning, error
